channel.title: loading on 灏天阁
channel.description: Recent content in loading on 灏天阁
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2008–2019, Steve Francia and the lee.so; all rights reserved.

item.title: 纯 CSS 实现 10 个 Loading 效果
item.description: HTML <div class="progress-1"></div> <div class="progress-2"></div> <div class="progress-3"></div> <div class="progress-4"></div> <div class="progress-5"></div> <div class="progress-6"></div> <div class="progress-7"></div> <div class="progress-8"></div> <div class="progress-9"></div> <div class="progress-10"></div> CSS .progress-1 { width:120px; height:20px; background: linear-gradient(#000 0 0) 0/0% no-repeat #ddd; animation:p1 2s infinite linear; } @keyframes p1 { 100% {background-size:100%} } .progress-2 { width:120px; height:20px; border-radius: 20px; background: linear-gradient(orange 0 0) 0/0% no-repeat lightblue; animation:p2 2s infinite steps(10); } @keyframes p2 { 100% {background-size:110%} } .progress-3 { width:120px; height:20px; border-radius: 20px; background: repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,#f03355 0 10px,#ffa516 0 20px) 0/0% no-repeat, repeating-linear-gradient(135deg,#ddd 0 10px,#eee 0 20px) 0/100%; animation:p3 2s infinite; } @keyframes p3 { 100% {background-size:100%} } .
